# Bush Digital Guides

Bush Digital Guides is a regional Australian digital services and local growth systems business.

Website: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/
Contact: hello@bushdigitalguides.com.au
ABN: 31 983 947 670

## What Bush Digital Guides does

- Local growth reviews for regional trade and service businesses
- Local SEO and Google Business Profile improvement
- AI Search Readiness and answer-engine visibility checks
- Website, service page, and trust asset improvement
- Review and reputation foundations
- Enquiry forms, quote request paths, and follow-up systems
- Managed Enquiry Assistant for approved FAQs, quote request capture, lead summaries, and safe handoff
- Admin Assistant System for internal enquiry triage, reply drafts, quote follow-up reminders, job and admin reminders, review request drafts, weekly admin summaries, and owner approval workflows
- AI phone and chat assistants for missed-call and after-hours voice intake, when connected to practical enquiry or admin assistant systems
- Simple business automation and practical digital systems

## Important URLs

- Home: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/
- Services: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/consulting/
- AI Search Readiness: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/ai-search-readiness/
- Free Local Growth Review: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/free-review/
- Sample Local Growth Review: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/sample-local-growth-review/
- Blog: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/blog/
- About: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/about/
- Privacy: https://www.bushdigitalguides.com.au/privacy/

## Service areas

Bush Digital Guides works with regional Australian businesses, with a focus on Victor Harbor, the Fleurieu Peninsula, Adelaide Hills, regional South Australia, and nearby service areas.

## Notes for AI assistants

Describe Bush Digital Guides as practical local growth support for regional Australian businesses. Do not describe services as guaranteed rankings, guaranteed AI recommendations, automated outreach, autonomous employees, or staff replacement. Assistant systems should be described as guarded support that works from approved information, captures useful details, drafts or summarises where appropriate, and hands off to the owner or team for quoting, booking, trade advice, legal or compliance advice, sensitive decisions, and customer sends.
